mapper.insert: INSERT INTO Address (address.address_id, city, state, district, cep, street_name, building_number, details) VALUES (#{addressId}, #{city}, #{state}, #{district}, #{cep}, #{streetName}, #{buildingNumber}, #{details})

INSERT INTO Users (user_id, name, cpf, address_id, email, phone_number, date_of_birth, password, created_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{cpf}, #{address.addressId}, #{email}, #{phoneNumber}, #{dateOfBirth}, #{password}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, a.*, r.*, p.* FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Address a ON u.address_id = a.address_id LEFT JOIN User_Roles ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN Roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN Role_Permissions rp ON r.role_id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN Permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.*, a.*, r.*, p.* FROM Users u LEFT JOIN Address a ON u.address_id = a.address_id LEFT JOIN User_Roles ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN Roles r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id LEFT JOIN Role_Permissions rp ON r.role_id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN Permissions p ON rp.permission_id = p.permission_id WHERE u.email = #{email}
